category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the official Actions runner for Gitea; official docs call act runner the runner for Gitea Actions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names the official Gitea Actions runner; Gitea official site lists Gitea Actions Runner as a product.
docs_sources: Official Gitea documentation has a dedicated Act Runner page; official Gitea project page is supplemental.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify gitea.com/gitea/runner as the official source project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Gitea docs identify this as the Gitea Actions runner; source_facts.executables shows the CLI executable.
